class.name: DecodedJWT
class.brief_description: An object-oriented wrapper for parsed JSON Web Tokens.

method.name: get_algorithm
method.description: Returns the algorithm (`alg`) specified in the token's header.

method.name: get_audience
method.description: Extracts the audience (`aud`) claim. May return a String or an Array depending on the token.

method.name: get_claim
method.description: Extracts a claim from the payload as an untyped Variant.

method.name: get_claim_as_array
method.description: Extracts a claim from the payload and casts it to an Array. Returns an empty Array if the claim does not exist or is not an array.

method.name: get_claim_as_bool
method.description: Extracts a claim from the payload and casts it to a boolean. Returns `false` if the claim does not exist.

method.name: get_claim_as_dictionary
method.description: Extracts a claim from the payload and casts it to a Dictionary.

method.name: get_claim_as_int
method.description: Extracts a claim from the payload and casts it to an integer.

method.name: get_claim_as_string
method.description: Extracts a claim from the payload and casts it to a String.

method.name: get_expiration_time
method.description: Returns the expiration time (`exp`) claim as a float representing UNIX time in seconds.

method.name: get_header
method.description: Returns the entire decoded JWT header as a dictionary.

method.name: get_header_claim
method.description: Extracts a specific claim from the JWT header.

method.name: get_header_claim_as_string
method.description: Extracts a specific claim from the JWT header and casts it to a String.

method.name: get_issued_at
method.description: Returns the issued at (`iat`) claim as a float representing UNIX time in seconds.

method.name: get_issuer
method.description: Returns the issuer (`iss`) claim as a String.

method.name: get_jwt_id
method.description: Returns the JWT ID (`jti`) claim as a String.

method.name: get_kid
method.description: Returns the Key ID (`kid`) from the header.

method.name: get_not_before
method.description: Returns the not before (`nbf`) claim as a float representing UNIX time in seconds.

method.name: get_payload
method.description: Returns the entire decoded JWT payload as a dictionary.

method.name: get_signature
method.description: Returns the trailing Base64Url-encoded signature portion of the token.

method.name: get_subject
method.description: Returns the subject (`sub`) claim as a String.

method.name: has_claim
method.description: Returns `true` if the payload contains the specified claim.

method.name: has_header_claim
method.description: Returns `true` if the header contains the specified claim.

method.name: is_expired
method.description: Checks whether the JWT is expired based on the `exp` claim against the current system time.

method.name: parse
method.description: Parses the given JWT string and caches its header and payload. Internal use mostly, prefer `JWT.parse(jwt)`.
